channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: GTA 6 : les offres sont là, suivez en live les précommandes du jeu le plus attendu au meilleur prix
item.description: Grand Theft Auto VI est sans conteste le jeu le plus attendu de la décennie, et l'attente s'apprête à devenir très concrète. Rockstar Games a officialisé la nouvelle : les précommandes ouvrent officiellement ce jeudi 25 juin à 00h00. Découvrez les meilleures offres pour réserver votre voyage à Vice City au meilleur prix.

item.title: Shopping for a 65-inch TV? Our experts have rounded up the best Prime Day deals from Samsung, LG, and TCL, starting at just $259.99
item.description: Our experts at TechRadar have rounded up the best 65-inch Prime Day TV deals, with record-low prices from Samsung, LG, and TCL, and prices starting at just $259.9.

item.title: 'We're entering a whole new age - the age of intelligence': Samsara CEO Sanjit Biswas lays out why the future of operations is AI
item.description: Samsara looks to enable the AI age for the operations industry with a host of new tools.

item.title: How to watch Czechia vs Mexico: Free Streams & TV Channels for FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch Czechia vs Mexico for free online and from anywhere as co-hosts a third win, while Czechia chase a place in the World Cup 2026 knockouts.

item.title: The 5 best Ninja appliances to upgrade your kitchen this summer — make perfect burgers, slushies, ice cream, and much more
item.description: Ninja is one of the biggest names in food prep, and for good reason. Here's our pick of the very best to upgrade your kitchen this summer.

item.title: Quote of the day by Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg: Privacy is no longer a social norm — declaring the erosion of social boundaries
item.description: Social media users have organically grown less concerned about privacy over time, according to the creator of Facebook

item.title: I’ve tested every LG OLED TV you can buy today — here’s what I recommend buying in the Prime Day sale, including 4K bargains that are perfect for the launch of GTA 6
item.description: Prime Day is the best time to buy an LG OLED, and 2025's models are cheaper than ever. But which is the best deal?

item.title: This year’s Prime Day deals on Apple products are the best I’ve seen
item.description: Amazon’s Prime Day is now in its second day, and whether you’re looking for a new pair of wireless earbuds or a smartwatch, there’s a good chance you’ll find a discount. The Apple Watch Series 11 has already dropped to a new low price, while the AirPods Pro 3 are discounted to $179. With Tim […]

item.title: AI was supposed to kill engineering jobs, but new data suggests they’re the most resilient
item.description: While AI dominates the layoff narrative, engineers are actually making up a larger share of new hires, according to SignalFire data.

item.title: The 16 best robot vacuum deals available during Prime Day
item.description: If you’ve been wanting to buy a robot vacuum but have been put off by how much it can cost to get a good one, now is not a bad time to start looking. We’re now on day two of Prime Day, and Amazon, along with retailers like Best Buy and Walmart, is offering discounts […]

item.title: The best Prime Day rival sales 2026: Best Buy, Target, Walmart, and more
item.description: The best rival sales to Amazon Prime Day in 2026, including Walmart, Target, Best Buy, Home Depot, Ulta, and more.

item.title: AI researchers continue to leave Google for its rivals
item.description: Top AI researchers Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel are leaving Google for Anthropic, following departures from top scientists Noam Shazeer and John Jumper.

item.title: Charlie Kirk’s legacy is a 30-year sentence for moving zines
item.description: Just days after a gunman killed conservative activist Charlie Kirk, it became clear that President Donald Trump would use the assassination to fuel a crackdown on free speech. To avenge Kirk's death, the administration vowed to go after so-called "antifa" (otherwise known as antifascist) terrorists. Now that promise is bearing fruit. This week, eight Texas […]...

item.title: Microsoft introduces cheaper Surface devices with half the memory
item.description: Microsoft just added a cheaper 12-inch Surface Pro and 13-inch Surface Laptop to its lineup. Both models come equipped with 8GB of RAM instead of 16GB, costing $849 for the specced-down Surface Pro and $949 for the Surface Laptop, as spotted earlier by Windows Central. When the 12-inch Surface Pro and 13-inch Surface Laptop launched […]

item.title: Amazon Prime Day is here: We found the 75+ best live deals on Apple, Sony, Kindle, and Lego favorites
item.description: Find the best Prime Day deals of 2026 on Sony headphones, Samsung TVs, Kindles, and Apple Watches.

item.title: Up to $400 Off: The Smart Fridge That Haunts My Algorithm
item.description: The Rocco isn’t on Amazon, but its rare sale knocks up to $400 off a fridge that can track your drinks and make any room look cooler. Save through July 5.

item.title: The memory chip crunch is paying off for this US company
item.description: Revenue quadrupled to $41.45 billion compared with the same period a year ago. The company's profit, meanwhile, rose from $1.88 billion to an incredible $28.2 billion year-over-year.

item.title: Prime Day 2026 live: Were vetting the best Amazon deals in real-time
item.description: Get live updates on the first Prime Day of 2026. We found record-low prices on AirPods, DJI drones, Kindles, Sony headphones, and more.

item.title: European Space Agency's Euclid captures the star-filled center of the Milky Way
item.description: NASA will begin mapping the galactic bulge with a mission later this summer.

item.title: Here’s one thing AI can’t do.
item.description: What’s up, type nerds? AI can do a lot, but it can’t do everything—especially when it comes to designing Fast Company’s latest magazine issue. The Summer Issue explores the theme of “Autonomy” and features a list of the 20 biggest names in AI today. Fast Company creative director Mike Schnaidt breaks down the design process […] What’s up, type nerds?...

item.title: Google a planqué une super amélioration audio dans Android 17, sans le dire à personne
item.description: Android 17 cache une petite pépite pour les oreilles exigeantes : la prise en charge du codec LHDC, qui débride le son sans fil des Pixel. Google n'en a pas soufflé mot, et il faut aller la dénicher au fond des réglages.

item.title: 20+ trading card deals to shop on Prime Day: Save on Pokémon TCG, Magic, One Piece, and more
item.description: Shop the best Prime Day trading card deals on Pokémon TCG, Magic, One Piece, and more, including MTG's Avatar Beginner Box under market price.

item.title: The Best Roborock Deal This Prime Day (2026)
item.description: Shopping Roborock’s models can feel overwhelming. But there’s just one I recommend snagging during Prime Day.

item.title: I found the 7 best Jackery Prime Day deals to keep you powered up when off grid
item.description: Save up to 50% on Jackery portable power stations during Amazon Prime Day, including solar panels.

item.title: Get a HP Omen RTX 5090 desktop for under $2740 — the ultimate workstation for AI devs, creative pros, and STEM students heading back to school
item.description: Serious horsepower under the hood.

item.title: Prime Day Live: Amazon’s Annual Sale Keeps on Truckin’ and So Are We
item.description: Prime Day is still rolling, and so is our live blog. We'll bring you deals, trends, and commentary during the second day of Amazon's annual summer sale.

item.title: A24 Knows You’re Mad About the Google AI Collab
item.description: Indie movie fans are upset about Google DeepMind’s $75 million investment in the studio, which comes as AI companies are deepening their influence in Hollywood.

item.title: New website names and shames companies that still don’t offer passkeys to users
item.description: According to a new site, 24% of the most popular websites in the world don't offer support for passkeys, which are considered the most secure way to log in to apps and services.

item.title: Mistral launches OCR 4, turning document extraction into a full enterprise AI play
item.description: Mistral AI on Tuesday released OCR 4, a document intelligence model that moves beyond raw text extraction to return structured representations of entire documents — complete with bounding boxes, block-type classification, and per-word confidence scores. The release marks Mistral's fourth generation of optical character recognition technology in roughly 15 months and lands at a moment when the company's pitch for European AI sovereignty has never been more commercially relevant.The model supports 170 languages across 10 language groups, accepts PDF, DOC, PPT, and OpenDocument formats, and can b...

item.title: How to watch Czechia vs. Mexico online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Czechia vs. Mexico in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: A new paper argues Microsoft exaggerated its quantum claims a year ago
item.description: A critique published in Nature Wednesday calls the basic technology behind Microsoft's "breakthrough" quantum computing chip the Majorana 1 into question. Microsoft unveiled the chip in February 2025 and said it featured a brand-new technology known as a topological qubit. Topological qubits, they said, would be the "building blocks" for their future quantum computer. Microsoft […]...

item.title: Elon Musk a trillionaire no more as SpaceX stock tumbles
item.description: Elon Musk has just lost his trillionaire status as SpaceX stock continues to spiral.

item.title: Best Dyson Deals for Prime Day: Vacuums, Hair Tools, and More (2026)
item.description: It's one of the best times to snag yourself a Dyson device, whether it's a vacuum or a beauty tool.

item.title: Best Prime Day Tech Deals Offer Up to $280 Off (2026): Phones, Watches, and More
item.description: Don't pay full price—snag one of these tasty Prime Day tech deals on some of our favorite WIRED-tested gadgets.

item.title: Get ready for Warhammer 40,000 11th Edition with these Prime Day Warhammer deals on paints, brushes, models & more
item.description: Prime Day? More like Primaris Day, as you can save a fortune on getting started with Warhammer 40,000 11th Edition.

item.title: Best Red-Light Therapy Mask: WIRED's Top 5, Ranked (2026)
item.description: Your face called, and it’s low-key offended you might trust TikTok more than WIRED.

item.title: The discontinued reMarkable 2 is selling fast on Amazon, but should you buy the new Paper Pure instead? Here’s how the two writing tablets compare, according to the man who designed them
item.description: The six-year-old reMarkable 2 is the top-selling writing tablet this Prime Day — here’s how it differs from the new reMarkable Paper Pure.

item.title: Buying an iPad this Prime Day? Don't spend money before you're sure which model you need — here are my recommendations for students, streamers, and more
item.description: We round up the best Prime Day iPad deals and highlight the right model for every use case.

item.title: I've tested the best Bose Bluetooth speakers on the market — here are the 3 Prime Day deals I'd spend my money on
item.description: I've tested the very best Bose Bluetooth speakers around, and these are the ones I'd recommend above all.

item.title: Prime Day is your chance to stock up on 4th of July must-haves — shop decor, party supplies, and grilling gear from $5.99
item.description: Prime Day is the perfect opportunity to stock up and save on 4th of July must-haves, and I'm rounding up my favorite deals on party supplies, decor, grilling gear, and more.

item.title: The best Pokémon deals to grab over Prime Day — Pokémon TCG, books, games, and more on sale
item.description: As of June 24, find some of the best deals on Pokémon TCG boxes, games, books, and more on sale for Amazon Prime Day.
